---
title: "Introduction to Programming"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.course-hero}
# Introduction to Programming

::: {.subtitle}
University of St. Gallen — Spring 2026
:::

::: {.meta}
Yvan Richard · Lectures & Summaries
:::
:::

## Lecture Notes

Each week's summary covers the key concepts from that week's lecture.

<div class="lecture-grid">

<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_01/summary_01.html">
<div class="week-label">Week 01</div>
<div class="week-title">Getting Started</div>
<div class="week-topics">The terminal · IDEs · Python &amp; environments · uv</div>
</a>

</div>

---

::: {style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #a0aec0; margin-top: 2rem;"}
Course material by Yvan Richard, based on lectures by Dr. Franziska Bender and Dr. Aurélien Sallin.
:::
